name: claw-voice-chat
description: Push-to-talk voice chat interface for OpenClaw channels
author: GreenSheep01201

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client,stt -c green,magenta,yellow "npm -C server run dev" "npm -C client run dev" "cd stt-backend && python -m app.main"
scripts.build: npm -C client run build && npm -C server run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,stt -c green,yellow "cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm -C server run start" "cd stt-backend && python -m app.main"
scripts.start:server: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm -C server run start
